title: GenAI Gateway: Full Model Access / Weight Export (AML.T0044)
description: Detects attempts to exfiltrate model artifacts (weights/checkpoints) through the GenAI gateway admin/export surface, the signature of model theft / full model access. Fires on model export operations or export/weights/download routes, ranking caller identity, API key, and source IP. MITRE ATLAS AML.T0044 (Full ML Model Access) / model theft.
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC GenAI Gateway Logs' and ('GenAI Operation' = 'model.export' or 'Request URL' like '*/export*' or 'Request URL' like '*weights*' or 'Request URL' like '*/models/download*') | stats count as ExportAttempts, distinctcount('GenAI Model') as Models by 'GenAI Identity', 'API Key ID', 'Client IP' | sort -ExportAttempts
falsepositives: Authorized model backup/export jobs from an admin account
